Name: Galatian
Notes: Machine of War. Deploys as a stationary summon via "Duty Eternal"; once deployed cannot be redeployed for rest of battle. Limited LE eligibility likely.

Name: Reanimator
Notes: Machine of War. Pure off-board support/repair unit, no base attack stat block; heals/revives allies only. Very recent unit, likely limited LE eligibility.

Name: Tson'ji
Notes: Machine of War (Shas'vre Vior'la Tson'ji, XV88 Broadside Battlesuit). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit.

Name: Exorcist
Notes: Machine of War (Artillery Tank). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit.

Name: Storm Speeder
Notes: Machine of War (Storm Speeder Hailstrike, Ravenwing Strike Craft). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit. Very recent unit, likely limited LE eligibility.

Name: Malleus Rocket Launcher
Notes: Machine of War (Field Ordnance Battery). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit. Secondary ability summons a Cadian Guardsman (Physical/Las) which is a separate unit, not counted as this unit's own damage.

Name: Rukkatrukk
Notes: Machine of War (Rukkatrukk Squigbuggy, Speedfreeks Trukk). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit.

Name: Biovore
Notes: Machine of War (Artillery Organism). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit, summons Spore Mines.

Name: Forgefiend
Notes: Machine of War (Daemon Engine). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit.

Name: Plagueburst Crawler
Notes: Machine of War (Daemon Engine). No base attack stat block; abilities-only unit.
